query:
SELECT 
  u.id, u.name,
  COUNT(*) as total_free_submissions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rs.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rs.status = 'playing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as playing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rs.status = 'reviewed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as reviewed
FROM users u
JOIN review_submissions rs ON u.id = rs.userId
WHERE rs.isPaidSubmission = false
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
ORDER BY total_free_submissions DESC
LIMIT 5;

  u.id, u.name,
  COUNT(*) as total_free_submissions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rs.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rs.status = 'playing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as playing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rs.status = 'reviewed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as reviewed
FROM users u
JOIN review_submissions rs ON u.id = rs.userId
WHERE rs.isPaidSubmission = false
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
ORDER BY total_free_submissions DESC
LIMIT 5;
